pr.title: Record: Scored-Position SLOT + Per-Sample Delta + GPTQ (val_bpb: 0.9300)

output.summary: Scored-position SLOT trains per-sample delta plus logit bias on eval scoring positions with real-data GPTQ calibration and cosine LR.
techniques: Eval-aligned SLOT mask focusing delta loss on stride-64 scoring tokens
Per-sample [bsz,1,dim] delta and logit bias for sequence-specific adaptation
Real-data GPTQ calibration with cosine LR over 16 AdamW steps
